content:
Thought: The task is to find the current ticket price for Leofoo Village. I can see a "票價資訊" (Ticket Information) button with numerical label 5. I will click this button.
Action: Click [5]

Observation: please analyze the attached screenshot and give the Thought and Action. I've provided the tag name of each element and the text it contains (if text exists). Note that <textarea> or <input> may be textbox, but not exactly. Please focus more on the screenshot and then refer to the textual information.
[1]: "票價資訊";	[2]: "交通指南";	[3]: "導覽地圖";	[4]: "設施保養";	[5]: "六福樂遊曆";	[6]: "設施查詢";	[7]: "動物探索";	[8]: "線上購票";	[10]: "首頁";	[11]: "遊園資訊";	[12]: "票價資訊";

Thought: I can see the ticket prices for different age groups. The adult ticket price is NT$1199.
Action: ANSWER; The current ticket price for adults (ages 18 & over) at Leofoo Village is NT$1199.
